articles.title: Alpine requests right of review with FIA over penalties which cost Monaco GP podium

articles.summary_en: The Alpine team has requested a review from the FIA over the penalties for pit lane speeding, which cost Pierre Gasly a podium finish at Monaco.

articles.summary_en: Ferrari deputy team principal Jerome D'Ambrosio has defended the Maranello outfit's strategy decisions during the chaotic Monaco Grand Prix, following a frustrating afternoon for home hero Charles Leclerc.

articles.title: Cadillac loses maiden F1 point as Perez penalised

articles.title: Russell “beyond frustration” after dismal, point-less Monaco GP
articles.title_fr: Russell dépassé par la frustration après un GP de Monaco catastrophique
articles.title_en: Russell 'beyond frustration' after dismal, point-less Monaco GP

articles.summary_en: George Russell, the clear favourite to win the drivers' championship, has slipped to third place after a torturous Monaco Grand Prix weekend. He finished outside the points after being penalized.

articles.title: George Russell “beyond frustration” after dismal, point-less Monaco GP

articles.summary_en: George Russell's championship hopes have taken a hit after a disastrous Monaco Grand Prix weekend. The Williams driver finished pointless after a disappointing qualifying session.

articles.title: Why so many F1 drivers were penalised for pitlane speeding in Monaco GP
articles.title_fr: Pénalités pour excès de vitesse en stand à Monaco
articles.title_en: Why so many F1 drivers were penalised for pitlane speeding in Monaco GP
articles.summary_fr: La course de Monaco a été marquée par plusieurs pénalités pour excès de vitesse en stand. Les documents de l'FIA révèlent que dans chaque cas, l'infringement était inférieur à un kilomètre par heure.
articles.summary_en: The Monaco Grand Prix produced a series of penalties for speeding in the pitlane. The FIA documents released after the race reveal that in every case the infringement was less than one kilometre per hour.

articles.title_fr: Pénalités pour excès de vitesse en stand à Monaco : pourquoi ?

articles.summary_en: The Monaco Grand Prix produced a series of penalties for speeding in the pitlane. The FIA documents released after the race reveal that in every case the infringement was less than one kilometre per hour.

articles.summary_en: Mercedes team principal Toto Wolff has admitted that internal "confusion" over strategy was the root cause of the pitstop blunder that cost George Russell a potential podium finish at the 2026 Monaco Grand Prix.
